tier_0_free.label: Free Tier (current default)
tier_0_free.suitable_for: solo dev, prototyping, demo, early beta
tier_0_free.risk: Rate limits hit under load. No SLA. Model availability varies.

tier_1_deepseek_edge.label: DeepSeek Edge (first paying customers)
tier_1_deepseek_edge.risk: Prompt caching essential to keep costs low. Budget cap $5/mo recommended [PDF Phase 1]
tier_1_deepseek_edge.source: PDF pages 2-3: DeepSeek V4 Flash pricing

tier_2_mixed.label: Mixed Tier (scaling — DeepSeek + Claude fallback)
tier_2_mixed.risk: Claude Sonnet 5 premium fallback ($10-15/M out) — use sparingly
tier_2_mixed.source: PDF pages 2-3: DeepSeek + Claude pricing table

tier_3_enterprise.label: Enterprise Tier
tier_3_enterprise.risk: Requires significant capital before revenue at this scale.
tier_3_enterprise.source: PDF page 3: Claude Opus 4.8 and Fable 5 pricing

phase_0_pre_launch.label: Pre-Launch (now → 3 months)
phase_0_pre_launch.key_milestone: Working UOM mesh stable, omni-saas Layer 3 hooks complete

phase_1_edge_bootstrap.label: Edge Bootstrap (3-9 months — PDF Tier 1)
revenue_sources: Ko-fi / Buy Me a Coffee one-time (₹200-500/transaction)
MCP server endpoints (per-query billing — PDF model)
phase_1_edge_bootstrap.pdf_monetization_tier: Edge Bootstrap: $0 CapEx, $10-30/mo OpEx, $150-800/mo yield [PDF page 6, 12]
phase_1_edge_bootstrap.key_milestone: First public demo. First sponsor. MCP server endpoint live.
phase_1_edge_bootstrap.source: PDF page 6, 12: Edge Bootstrap tier ($0 CapEx, $150-800/mo yield)

phase_2_micro_saas.label: Micro-SaaS Credit Loops (6-15 months — PDF Edge Bootstrap scaling)
revenue_sources: Credit-based micro-SaaS billing via Dodo Payments [PDF model]
phase_2_micro_saas.pdf_monetization_tier: Edge Bootstrap → Mid-Tier: $0-2500 CapEx, $30-80/mo OpEx, $150-1200/mo yield
phase_2_micro_saas.key_milestone: omni-saas S0+S1 working. Dodo Payments integrated. First paying customer.
phase_2_micro_saas.source: PDF page 6, 12: Mid-Tier CUDA Station ($2,500-4,500 CapEx, $1,200-3,500/mo yield)

phase_3_cuda_station.label: CUDA Station / Swarm Factory (12-24 months — PDF Mid-Tier)
revenue_sources: Private MCP server queries (per-query billing) [PDF model]
API reseller margin on model calls: ₹2000-10000/month
phase_3_cuda_station.pdf_monetization_tier: CUDA Station: $2,500-4,500 CapEx, $50-150/mo OpEx, $1,200-3,500/mo yield [PDF page 6]
phase_3_cuda_station.key_milestone: Full omni-saas S0-S4 pipeline. RTX 4090 or better online. Singapore consulting contracts.
phase_3_cuda_station.source: PDF page 6, 12: Mid-Tier CUDA Station pricing

phase_4_enterprise_mcp.label: Enterprise MCP / Sovereign Studio (24-36 months — PDF Enterprise Tier)
revenue_sources: White-label UOM mesh for other solo devs / micro-agencies
Swarm output as a service (research packs, build packs)
Enterprise MCP server subscriptions for regulated industries
phase_4_enterprise_mcp.pdf_monetization_tier: Enterprise Studio: $6,500-10,000 CapEx, $200-800/mo OpEx, $4,500-15,000/mo yield [PDF page 7, 12]
phase_4_enterprise_mcp.key_milestone: Mac Studio M4 Max / dual GPU cluster. Regulated industry contracts. 70%+ gross margin.
phase_4_enterprise_mcp.source: PDF page 7, 12: Enterprise Studio tier pricing

edge_bootstrap.strategy: Credit-based micro-SaaS, automated content generation, local research tasks

cuda_station.strategy: Private MCP server endpoints, local ComfyUI API hosting, rapid developer swarms

enterprise_studio.strategy: Multi-tenant SaaS marketplace, regulated legal/publishing database queries

scenario_conservative.label: Conservative (most likely — PDF Edge Bootstrap)
scenario_conservative.note: Achievable if first 5 paying customers reached at month 6. Matches PDF Edge Bootstrap yield ($150-800/mo).

scenario_realistic.label: Realistic (median — PDF CUDA Station transition)
scenario_realistic.note: Requires consistent shipping + Singapore consulting contracts. Approaches PDF Mid-Tier yield ($1,200-3,500/mo).

scenario_optimistic.label: Optimistic (top 10% — PDF Enterprise Studio)
scenario_optimistic.note: Requires enterprise contract or viral product launch. Matches PDF Enterprise yield ($4,500-15,000/mo).

singapore_context.advantage: Singapore S-Pass holder enables access to high-ticket consulting contracts (SGD 100-500/hr) unavailable in pure-India market.
singapore_context.risk: Employment contract may restrict secondary income. Review MOM regulations before active SaaS monetization.
singapore_context.conversion_note: All INR figures approximate. 1 SGD ≈ 62 INR (2026). Singapore yield potential 3-5x India yield for same effort.

roi_summary.warning: Solo non-developer SaaS median MRR at 12 months is under $500/month globally. PDF's Edge Bootstrap yield ($150-800/mo) is the most likely first-year outcome. Do not skip to CUDA Station or Enterprise without first validating Edge Bootstrap revenue.
